events.description: An IP address (192.168.1.100) has triggered 50 failed login attempts in a short period, indicating a brute-force or credential-stuffing attempt.
events.action: Block the source IP address immediately, audit target accounts for successful logins from other IPs, and enforce multi-factor authentication (MFA).

events.description: An internal host at 10.0.0.55 downloaded an unusually large volume of data (15.5 GB), indicating potential unauthorized data exfiltration or a compromised asset.
events.action: Isolate host 10.0.0.55 immediately, audit the user account associated with the transfer, and analyze the destination of the downloaded data.

events.description: An internal IP (172.16.0.200) performed a scan of 1000 ports, indicating potential host compromise and lateral movement reconnaissance within the network.
events.action: Isolate the host at 172.16.0.200 from the network, investigate active processes, and review network security group rules.
